initial_candidates.sql:
WITH pre_detail_complete_events AS (
    SELECT 
        session,
        path,
        search_type,
        stamp,
        action,
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY session) AS total_pre_events
    FROM activity_log
    WHERE 
        action NOT IN ('/detail', '/complete')
        AND search_type IS NOT NULL
        AND search_type != ''
),
first_detail_complete AS (
    SELECT 
        session,
        MIN(stamp) AS first_detail_complete_stamp
    FROM activity_log
    WHERE 
        action IN ('/detail', '/complete')
    GROUP BY session
),
filtered_events AS (
    SELECT 
        a.session,
        a.path,
        a.search_type,
        a.stamp,
        CASE 
            WHEN f.first_detail_complete_stamp IS NULL THEN 1
            WHEN a.stamp < f.first_detail_complete_stamp THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS is_pre_event
    FROM activity_log a
    LEFT JOIN first_detail_complete f ON a.session = f.session
    WHERE 
        a.search_type IS NOT NULL
        AND a.search_type != ''
),
pre_event_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        session,
        COUNT(*) AS pre_event_count
    FROM filtered_events
    WHERE is_pre_event = 1
    GROUP BY session
),
min_pre_event_count AS (
    SELECT MIN(pre_event_count) AS min_count
    FROM pre_event_counts
)
SELECT 
    f.session,
    f.path,
    f.search_type
FROM filtered_events f
JOIN pre_event_counts p ON f.session = p.session
JOIN min_pre_event_count m ON p.pre_event_count = m.min_count
WHERE f.is_pre_event = 1;

WITH pre_event_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        a1.session,
        a1.path,
        a1.search_type,
        COUNT(*) AS pre_event_count
    FROM activity_log a1
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 
        FROM activity_log a2 
        WHERE a2.session = a1.session 
          AND (a2.action = '/detail' OR a2.action = '/complete')
          AND a2.stamp > a1.stamp
    )
    AND a1.search_type != ''
    AND a1.stamp < (
        SELECT MIN(a3.stamp) 
        FROM activity_log a3 
        WHERE a3.session = a1.session 
          AND (a3.action = '/detail' OR a3.action = '/complete')
    )
    GROUP BY a1.session, a1.path, a1.search_type
),
min_count AS (
    SELECT MIN(pre_event_count) AS min_pre_event_count
    FROM pre_event_counts
)
SELECT 
    session,
    path,
    search_type
FROM pre_event_counts
WHERE pre_event_count = (SELECT min_pre_event_count FROM min_count);

WITH pre_click_events AS (
  SELECT 
    session,
    path,
    search_type,
    stamp,
    action,
    CASE 
      WHEN action IN ('/detail', '/complete') THEN 1 
      ELSE 0 
    END AS is_target_action
  FROM activity_log
  WHERE search_type IS NOT NULL AND search_type != ''
),
first_target_per_session AS (
  SELECT 
    session,
    MIN(stamp) AS first_target_stamp
  FROM pre_click_events
  WHERE is_target_action = 1
  GROUP BY session
),
filtered_events AS (
  SELECT 
    p.session,
    p.path,
    p.search_type,
    p.stamp,
    p.action
  FROM pre_click_events p
  LEFT JOIN first_target_per_session f ON p.session = f.session
  WHERE (f.first_target_stamp IS NULL OR p.stamp < f.first_target_stamp)
),
counted_sessions AS (
  SELECT 
    session,
    path,
    search_type,
    COUNT(*) AS event_count
  FROM filtered_events
  GROUP BY session, path, search_type
),
min_count AS (
  SELECT MIN(event_count) AS min_event_count
  FROM counted_sessions
)
SELECT 
  c.session,
  c.path,
  c.search_type
FROM counted_sessions c
JOIN min_count m ON c.event_count = m.min_event_count
ORDER BY c.session;

WITH pre_click_events AS (
    SELECT 
        session,
        path,
        search_type,
        stamp,
        action,
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY session) AS total_events,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY session ORDER BY stamp) AS event_order,
        MIN(CASE WHEN action IN ('/detail', '/complete') THEN stamp END) OVER (PARTITION BY session) AS first_conversion_stamp
    FROM activity_log
    WHERE search_type IS NOT NULL AND search_type != ''
),
filtered_events AS (
    SELECT 
        session,
        path,
        search_type,
        stamp,
        first_conversion_stamp
    FROM pre_click_events
    WHERE stamp < first_conversion_stamp
),
event_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        session,
        COUNT(*) AS pre_conversion_count
    FROM filtered_events
    GROUP BY session
),
min_count AS (
    SELECT MIN(pre_conversion_count) AS min_pre_conv_count
    FROM event_counts
)
SELECT 
    f.session,
    f.path,
    f.search_type
FROM filtered_events f
JOIN event_counts ec ON f.session = ec.session
JOIN min_count mc ON ec.pre_conversion_count = mc.min_pre_conv_count
ORDER BY f.session, f.path, f.search_type;

WITH pre_detail_complete_events AS (
    SELECT 
        al.session,
        al.path,
        al.search_type,
        al.stamp,
        MIN(CASE 
            WHEN al.action IN ('/detail', '/complete') THEN al.stamp 
            ELSE NULL 
        END) OVER (PARTITION BY al.session) AS first_detail_complete_stamp
    FROM activity_log al
    WHERE al.search_type IS NOT NULL AND al.search_type != ''
),
filtered_events AS (
    SELECT 
        session,
        path,
        search_type,
        COUNT(*) AS event_count
    FROM pre_detail_complete_events
    WHERE stamp < first_detail_complete_stamp
    GROUP BY session, path, search_type
),
min_event_count AS (
    SELECT MIN(event_count) AS min_count
    FROM filtered_events
)
SELECT 
    fe.session,
    fe.path,
    fe.search_type
FROM filtered_events fe
JOIN min_event_count mec ON fe.event_count = mec.min_count;

aggregation.selected_sql:
WITH pre_detail_complete_events AS (
    SELECT 
        al.session,
        al.path,
        al.search_type,
        al.stamp,
        MIN(CASE 
            WHEN al.action IN ('/detail', '/complete') THEN al.stamp 
            ELSE NULL 
        END) OVER (PARTITION BY al.session) AS first_detail_complete_stamp
    FROM activity_log al
    WHERE al.search_type IS NOT NULL AND al.search_type != ''
),
filtered_events AS (
    SELECT 
        session,
        path,
        search_type,
        COUNT(*) AS event_count
    FROM pre_detail_complete_events
    WHERE stamp < first_detail_complete_stamp
    GROUP BY session, path, search_type
),
min_event_count AS (
    SELECT MIN(event_count) AS min_count
    FROM filtered_events
)
SELECT 
    fe.session,
    fe.path,
    fe.search_type
FROM filtered_events fe
JOIN min_event_count mec ON fe.event_count = mec.min_count;
